message:
feat(core): add ColdTierRetriever trait and cold page retrieval to TieredScrollback

Adds the cold tier retrieval interface for ft-1memj.19:
- ColdTierRetriever trait: defines the contract for fetching evicted
  pages from cold storage (SQLite capture pipeline)
- ColdRetrievalError: typed error enum (PageNotFound, StorageUnavailable,
  DecompressionFailed) with serde + Display
- ColdPageData: result struct for retrieved page lines
- NullColdRetriever: no-op impl that always returns PageNotFound
- TieredScrollback::cold_line() and cold_page(): methods that delegate
  to a ColdTierRetriever for seamless cross-tier line access

7 new tests covering mock retriever, null retriever, cold line access,
error display, and serde roundtrip. All 48 scrollback_tiers tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
